title: Epigenomics of human CD8 T cell differentiation and aging.
author: Moskowitz DM Zhang DW Hu B Le Saux S Yanes RE Ye Z Buenrostro JD Weyand CM Greenleaf WJ Goronzy JJ
content: S-EPMC5399889 PMC5399889 Epigenomics of human CD8 T cell differentiation and aging. The efficacy of the adaptive immune response declines dramatically with age, but the cell-intrinsic mechanisms driving immune aging in humans remain poorly understood.
